name: Master Hyperion
name_jp: マスター・ヒュペリオン
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 1 "The Agent" monster from your hand, field, or GY. Once per turn: You can banish 1 LIGHT Fairy monster from your GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy that target. While "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can activate this effect up to twice per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 1 "The Agent" monster from your hand, field, or GY. Once per turn: You can banish 1 LIGHT Fairy monster from your GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy that target. While "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can activate this effect up to twice per turn.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 1 "The Agent" monster from your hand, field, or GY. While "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can activate this effect up to twice per turn.

sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling
Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
